name: Dev Reference, Core
description: Admin-only companion to devref_card. Stores a list of named 'boards' (id + label + colour + body text) that devref_card cells pick from via choices_from. Exists primarily as a developer reference: this is the shape every shared-state / instance-registry plugin (glances_core, picture_gallery, ...) uses.

settings.name: max_boards
settings.label: Max boards
settings.help: Soft cap on saved boards. Lives under Settings → Plugins → Dev Reference, Core; demonstrates the plugin-level ``settings`` surface (vs cell_options, which are per-cell).
